description: Splits selected text objects apart and holds them at offset positions. Each argument can be a select variable (auto-layout offset) or a tuple with explicit position offset using buff(row, col). To gather split objects back, use textgather() separately. Supports animation duration and color customization.
utility: Animate text splitting to multiple positions — explodes text apart and holds

arguments.name: selection
arguments.description: Select variable or tuple with explicit offset. Multiple selections allowed. Bare variable uses auto-layout, tuple specifies exact position offset.

arguments.name: buff
arguments.description: Position offset as tuple second element: (selectVar, buff(-1, 0)) — offset (-1 row, 0 col)

alternates.description: Split selections apart with automatic positioning
Split with explicit position offsets using buff(row, col) tuples
Mix auto-layout and explicit offsets in same expression

examples.scenario: Split n and n-1 terms in power rule
Split x and y difference terms
Split and then gather back to original position
